$comment: Phase 7 (TODO-08) Agent-Task Routing consensus verdict. consensus-agent (BINARY APPROVED/REJECTED) gate over AR1 (assignments + Maker-Checker + scores), AR2 (DAG proof), AR3 (context windows + PII isolation), AR4 (CoT prompts). reliability-auditor RS, hallucination-detector + context-faithfulness-engineer checks, and security-testing-engineer P1 OWASP coverage all folded in. Source: ar1_assignments.json, ar2_dag_proof.json, ar3_context_windows.json, implementation_execution_plan.json.

security_p1_detail.owasp_llm_top10_router: STORY-014 review enforces LLM01 prompt injection + strict-JSON + deterministic fallback per ADV-004/NFR-008

checks.hallucination_check: 0 fabricated agents, 0 invented FRs/ACs, 0 phantom API operationIds. Every assignment, edge, window, and prompt binds to real Sprint-1 stories, real KG agents, and real openapi operationIds (routeQuery, answerQuery, ingestDocument, listDocuments, getDocument, deleteDocument, getDocumentToc, exportDocumentData, getHealth, getReadiness).
checks.context_faithfulness: All routing honors the 10 ADRs and AGREED CONTRACTS (in-process async router, /v1/route routing-only, section_id universal key, data-engineer owns embed+upsert, devops health/ready, threat-modeling<->ai-engineer OWASP-LLM, security-compliance-mapper<->SA DPDP).
checks.reliability_audit: RS=1.0: every Sprint-1 story has a dev_agent + a distinct review_agent (Maker-Checker), a routing_score>=0.75, a bounded isolated context window, and 3 model-aware CoT prompts; the dependency graph is a proven DAG with a valid 5-wave execution order; no open items.
